info.english_meaning: to bathe to extract to distill to juice to agitate to churn
info.hindI_arTa: snAna karanA yaMtrAdi dvArA arka nikAlanA maTanA madya cuAnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: snAne akarmakaH  anyatra sakarmakaH  aBizavaH snapanapIqanasnAnasurAsanDAnAdiH  ' zuYaH suneti sunute prasavESvaryayorasOt  gatO tayoSca savate dviruktyA tasya so na zaH ' iti (Slo. 21) devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sutaM tasmAttava prasutamAsutaM kule dfSyate' (CAM॰u॰5.12.1) prasutaM santataM savanam
'tasmAttava sutaM prasutamAsutaM kule dfSyate' (CAM0 u0 5121) ekAhaH ahInaH satram iti viBAgaH karmaRAm tezu pravartamAnaM somABizavaRaM kramAt sutAdiSabdEraBiDIyate
'na pUrvadIkziRaH saMsavo'sti' dvayorbahUnAM vA yajamAnAnAM sparDamAnAnAM samBUya somABizavaH saMsavaH
'dvayo rbahUnAM vA yajamAnAnAM sparDamAnAnAM samBUya somABizavaH saMsavaH' (ASva0 SrO0 6611)
'yo asmE tIvrAntsomA~ Asunoti prayasvAn' (aTarva0 20895) Asunoti pIqayati

'devasya saviturmatimAsavaM viSvadevyam' (vA0 saM0 2214) AsavamAsotum udDarzayitum uvawastu Bagamityasya viSezaRaM manyate sutaM tasmAttava prasutamAsutaM kule dfSyate AsutiH surAsanDAnam AsutIvalaH SORqikaH
'rAmABizavasaMyuktAScakrureva kaTA miTaH' (rA0 2616) rAmABizavo rAmABizekaH atra DAtuH snAnamaBiDatte
'ekaM vA etAvindramaBisaMsunutaH' (tE0 brA0 1461) aBilakzya saMBUya somayAgaM kuruta ityarTaH
